description: Coordinate a full Codex creation pass by running codex-deepdesign, codex-impl-plan-completion-loop, and codex-source-security-check-loop in sequence.

prompts.rielflowPromptTemplate: Coordinate {{workflowId}}. Normalize the operator creation request, then dispatch codex-deepdesign to create or revise the design with deep, broad, and adversarial design reviews. After deep design returns accepted, summarize the design result and dispatch codex-impl-plan-completion-loop so active implementation plans are completed through the adversarial implementation review loop. After implementation-plan completion returns, summarize implementation evidence and dispatch codex-source-security-check-loop over the explicit target paths or repository target. Finish only after the security check loop reports no verified high or medium findings.
prompts.workerSystemPromptTemplate: Return concise business JSON only. Keep child workflow inputs, accepted results, design docs, implementation plans, target paths, changed files, verification evidence, security findings, residual risks, and routing decisions explicit.

steps.description: Normalize the deep creation request and stage child workflow inputs.
Package the design request for codex-deepdesign.
Summarize the accepted deep design result before implementation-plan completion.
Summarize the accepted implementation-plan completion result before security checks.
Package the source security check request.
Summarize the accepted security check result.
Publish the combined deep creation result.

rielflowPackage.title: codex-deep-creation
rielflowPackage.description: Run deep design, adversarial implementation-plan completion, and source security checks as one Codex creation workflow.
